generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100RobotSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot for precision machining tasks engineering process follows structured methodology including problem identification, asset and model analysis, validation against physical data, and iterative evolution via model updates based on operational feedback"
    base:contains VerticalAxisMotor, Gearbox, SINUMERIK840DSLControlSystem
]

instance VerticalAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox component in the first vertical axis"
]

instance SINUMERIK840DSLControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system for the MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance VerticalAxisMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor for the first vertical axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataTransmission
]

instance GearboxTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for the gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataTransmission
]

instance SINUMERIK840DSLControlSystemSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Operational sensors within Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataTransmission
]

instance MQTTDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VerticalAxisMotorPositionSensor, GearboxTemperatureSensor, SINUMERIK840DSLControlSystemSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series position data from vertical axis motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler, JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler
]

instance GearboxTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series temperature data from gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler, JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler
]

instance ControlSystemOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational data from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl control system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler, JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler
]

instance MBSEWithSysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Based Systems Engineering using SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, SemanticSupportService
]

instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) methodology for complexity handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance OOSEMEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for complexity handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for complexity handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for complexity handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticSupportService
]

instance ACMEADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description language for component-and-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AADLADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description language for component-and-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MontiArcADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture description language for component-and-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLIBDEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML IBDs for component-and-connector-based system descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for detailed behavior specification and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLIBDStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using SysML IBDs for component-and-connector descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDEnabler
]

instance AADLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using AADL for component-and-connector descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLADLEnabler
]

instance MontiArcStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural model using MontiArc for component-and-connector descriptions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADLEnabler
]

instance SysMLStateMachineBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model implemented via state machines in SysML v1.7"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLIBDEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model implemented via MontiArc Automaton state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcADLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model using MathWorks Simulink for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance CppSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model using C++ programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppProgrammingLanguageEnabler
]

instance JavaSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model using Java programming language for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaProgrammingLanguageEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of white-box and black-box friction models for the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PreciseMotionControlAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for monitoring system states"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance SemanticSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Semantic support to clarify physical relationships and system understanding"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemUnderstandingInsight
]

instance PreciseMotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust motion control based on friction models for precise machining operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing visual representation of system states for monitoring"
]

instance SystemUnderstandingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight clarifying physical relationships and system understanding through semantic support"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses development phase using Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) with SysML for requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer modeling, transitioning to operational phase where automated data flow from physical systems (e.g., robot motion sensors) to the digital twin enables real-time monitoring and predictive analysis."
]
